# commune-openclaw-email-quickstart

> Give your OpenClaw agents a real email address. Two installable skills — commune-email and commune-agent-network — add full email inbox management and agent-to-agent task delegation to any OpenClaw agent. Powered by Commune (commune.email), a production-grade email infrastructure for AI agents.

Install with one command: `bash install.sh`

## Skills

- [commune-email](skills/commune-email/SKILL.md): Create inboxes, read threads, send and reply to emails, search by semantic query. Agent identity via permanent email address.
- [commune-agent-network](skills/commune-agent-network/SKILL.md): Send tasks to other agents by email address, receive results in thread, search past tasks semantically. Agent-to-agent communication.

## Agent Identity

Each OpenClaw agent can have its own email address — a permanent identity on the internet. `commune.inboxes.create(local_part="my-agent")` returns `my-agent@org.commune.email`. This address persists across restarts, sessions, and framework versions.

## Agent-to-Agent Communication

Agents discover each other by email address. Tasks are delegated as emails. Results are replies in the same thread. The `thread_id` is the task's unique identifier and preserves the full chain. Key primitives:
- `POST /v1/messages/send` with `to=agent.address` and `idempotencyKey` — send task safely
- `thread_id` in reply body — binds result to task chain
- `GET /v1/threads/:id/messages` — read full provenance
- `GET /v1/search/threads?q=query` — find past similar tasks before starting duplicate work

## Setup

- [README](README.md): Full setup guide, example prompts, architecture diagrams
- [Install script](install.sh): Automated installer with env validation

## API Reference

- [Commune API docs](https://docs.commune.email): Full REST API reference
- [Commune dashboard](https://commune.email/dashboard): Get your API key, manage inboxes
